zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Smith Sr.於大約1649年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可辛加姆時，他的父親Ralph Smith35歲，母親Grace37歲。他於1681年與Mary Mayo在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼易亞斯坦結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1720年10月18日之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Smith Sr.于大约1649年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可辛加姆时，他的父亲Ralph Smith35岁，母亲Grace37岁。他于1681年与Mary Mayo在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼易亞斯坦结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1720年10月18日之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦。

nameMeanings.name: Smith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name denoting a worker in metal, especially iron, such as a blacksmith or farrier, from Middle English smith ‘smith’ (Old English smith, probably a derivative of smītan ‘to strike, hammer’). Early examples are also found in the Latin form Faber . Metal-working was one of the earliest occupations for which specialist skills were required, and its importance ensured that this term and its equivalents in other languages were the most widespread of all occupational surnames in Europe. Medieval smiths were important not only in making horseshoes, plowshares, and other domestic articles, but above all for their skill in forging swords, other weapons, and armor. This is also the most frequent of all surnames in the US. It is very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below). This surname (in any of the two possible English senses; see also below) is also found in Haiti. See also Smither .

English: from Middle English smithe ‘smithy, forge’ (Old English smiththe). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived in or by a blacksmith's shop, occupational, for someone who worked in one, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Smitha in King's Nympton (Devon). Compare Smithey .
Irish and Scottish: sometimes adopted for Gaelic Mac Gobhann, Irish Mac Gabhann ‘son of the smith’. See McGowan .

variants.name: Smither
meanings: English (Surrey): occupational name from Middle English smith(i)ere, smeth(i)ere ‘blacksmith’, a derivative of Middle English smithen, smethen, ‘to make (something) in metal, to forge’. Compare Smith .

variants.name: Smithey
meanings: English (Yorkshire): from Middle English smithi ‘smithy, forge’ (Old Norse smithja), used either as a topographic name for someone who lived in or by a blacksmith's shop, or an occupational name for someone who worked in one. Compare Smith and Smead .

variants.name: Smyth
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Ronan, Aidan, Brigid, Conor, Eoin, Malachy, Paddy.
English: variant of   Smith  . This form of the surname is particularly common Ireland.

variants.name: McGowan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Siobhan, Cormac, Seamus, Aileen, Colm, Eithne, Kieran, Niall, Paddy.

Scottish and Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac (a') Ghobhainn or Mac Gobhann (Scottish) or Mac (an) Ghabhann (Irish), ‘son of (the) smith’. This name has also been Anglicized as Smith and Smithson .

variants.name: Smead
meanings: occupational name from Middle English smeth(e) ‘smith’, a phonetic variant of Smith 1 that was widespread in medieval England, especially in south-eastern and south-western counties.

topographic, occupational, and habitational name from Middle English smethe ‘smithy, forge’ (Old English smethe), a side form of Smith 2, for someone who lived and worked at a blacksmith's, or who lived in or came from a place so named, such as Smeeth (Kent) or Smeed Farm in Hastingleigh (Kent). Compare the synonymous Smithey .

variants.name: Faber
meanings: German, Dutch, French (Alsace and Lorraine), and Danish; Slovak and Czech (mainly Fáber): occupational name from Latin faber ‘blacksmith’. At the time of the Reformation, it was much used as a humanistic name, a translation into Latin of vernacular surnames such as German Schmidt and Dutch Smit . Compare Fabri and Fauber .

History: In North America, this surname was originally also part of a title. It was François Lefebvre, sieur Duplessis Faber from Paris, France, whose title sieur Duplessis Faber was shortened into the surname Faber. He married Marie-Madeleine Chorel in Champlain, QC, in 1689.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Smith Sr. was born about 1649, in Hingham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Ralph Smith, was 35 and his mother, Grace, was 37. He married Mary Mayo in 1681, in Eastham, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. He died before 18 October 1720, in Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

Il a épousé Mary Mayo en 1681, à Eastham, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé avant 18 octobre 1720, à Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Smith Sr. è nato il circa 1649 nel Hingham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Ralph Smith, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Grace, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Mary Mayo nel 1681, nel Eastham, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì prima del 18 ottobre 1720, nel Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Smith Sr.が約1649年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクヒンガムで生まれた時，父Ralph Smithは35歳，母Graceは37歳であった。1681年にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーエアスサムでMary Mayoと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1720年10月18日以前にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルエアスサムで死去した。

ko.of Eastham, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Bri: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스

ko.Hingham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay, Bri: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 잉함
ko.Eastham, Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, Br: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 바른스타블일 이스섬

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Smith Sr.(이)가 대략 1649년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 잉함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Smith(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Grace(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1681년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 이스섬에서 Mary Mayo(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1720년 10월 18일 이전 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 이스섬에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Smith Sr. nasceu aproximadamente 1649, em Hingham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Ralph Smith, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Grace, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Mayo em 1681, em Eastham, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 18 de outubro de 1720, em Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Smith Sr. родился около 1649 г. в местности хингхам, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Ralph Smith было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Grace, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Mayo в 1681 г. в местности эастам, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер перед 18 октябрь 1720 г. в местности эастам, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

Murió antes de 18 de octubre de 1720, en Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
